mapper.select: SELECT MST_SEQ , STATUS , PROC_YN , PROC_TYPE FROM mcpeventmng.NMCP_EVENT_ORDER WHERE MST_SEQ = #{mstSeq}
SELECT MST_SEQ , EVENT_ORDER , NTCART_SEQ FROM mcpeventmng.NMCP_EVENT_ORDER_DTL WHERE MST_SEQ = #{mstSeq}

update.foreach: UPDATE mcpeventmng.NMCP_EVENT_BOARD_BAS SET EVENT_ORDER = #{item.eventOrder} , AMD_ID = 'BATCH' , AMD_DT = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE NTCART_SEQ = #{item.ntcartSeq}

mapper.update: UPDATE mcpeventmng.NMCP_EVENT_ORDER SET STATUS = '0' , PROC_YN = 'Y' , AMD_ID = 'BATCH' , AMD_DTTM = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE MST_SEQ = #{mstSeq}
